zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri III de SULLY於大約1252年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Henri II de SULLY30歲，母親Pétronille DE JOIGNY23歲。他和Marguerite de BEAUMIERS至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他在法國被列為grand bouteiller de france。他去世於大約1285年在法國奧其坦尼奧德阿拉貢享年35歲，埋葬在法國崔傑布格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri III de SULLY于大约1252年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Henri II de SULLY30岁，母亲Pétronille DE JOIGNY23岁。他和Marguerite de BEAUMIERS至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他在法国被列为grand bouteiller de france。他去世于大约1285年在法国奧其坦尼奧德阿拉貢享年35岁，埋葬在法国崔傑布格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SULLY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri III de SULLY was born about 1252, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Henri II de SULLY, was 30 and his mother, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Marguerite de BEAUMIERS. His occupation is listed as grand bouteiller de france in France. He died about 1285, in Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri III de SULLY est né environ 1252, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Henri II de SULLY, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Marguerite de BEAUMIERS. Sa profession de son indiquée est grand bouteiller de france à France. Il est décédé environ 1285, à Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri III de SULLY um 1252 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri II de SULLY 30 und seine Mutter Pétronille DE JOIGNY 23. Er hatte mit Marguerite de BEAUMIERS mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als grand bouteiller de france in Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb um 1285 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Bourges, Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri III de SULLY è nato il circa 1252 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Henri II de SULLY, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Marguerite de BEAUMIERS. La sua occupazione è indicata come grand bouteiller de france nel Francia. Morì circa 1285, nel Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri III de SULLYが約1252年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Henri II de SULLYは30歳，母Pétronille DE JOIGNYは23歳であった。彼はMarguerite de BEAUMIERSとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。フランスでの職業はgrand bouteiller de franceと記録されている。彼は約1285年にフランスオクシタニーアウドアラゴンで35歳で死去し，フランスセントアチャーボウルジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri III de SULLY(이)가 대략 1252년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri II de SULLY(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Pétronille DE JOIGNY(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Marguerite de BEAUMIERS(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스에서 grand bouteiller de france이었다. 그는 대략 1285년 프랑스 옥시탠이 오드 아라곤에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 처 부르그스에 묻혔다.

mg.ABT 1252–ABT 1285: tany ho any amin'ny 1252–tany ho any amin'ny 1285

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri III de SULLY nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Henri II de SULLY, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Marguerite de BEAUMIERS. Sua profissão aparece como grand bouteiller de france em França. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1285, em Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Bourges, Cher, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri III de SULLY родился около 1252 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri II de SULLY было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Pétronille DE JOIGNY, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Marguerite de BEAUMIERS.  Он работал по профессии grand bouteiller de france в местности Франция. Он умер около 1285 г. в местности арагон, ауд, окситани, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности бургесь, чир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri III de SULLY nació aproximadamente 1252, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Henri II de SULLY, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Marguerite de BEAUMIERS. Su ocupación registrada era grand bouteiller de france en Francia. Murió aproximadamente 1285, en Aragon, Aude, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.
